assertions.title: Timer expiry and manual reveal converge to the same end state

steps.action: Start an English solo round, enter test words, and trigger early reveal.
steps.expected: Reveal ends the round with locked entry, results visible, and post-round controls available.
steps.observed: Manual reveal showed Solo results, kept Restart round / Reveal words controls visible, and exposed scoring plus result inspection.

steps.action: Restart into a fresh round and wait for the 1-minute timer to expire naturally.
steps.expected: Timeout should land on the same visible post-round surface as manual reveal.
steps.observed: Timeout reached 00:00 and showed the same Solo results surface with the same post-round affordances and locked entry.

evidence.network: No backend/API calls involved; localhost document + static assets only.

assertions.title: Results summarize the board and sort words for scanning

steps.action: Reveal a completed English solo round on desktop.
steps.expected: Results should summarize totals and show solver words sorted longest to shortest.
steps.observed: Desktop results showed Found words / Entered / Score summary, and solver output began with 8-letter words before shorter entries.

steps.action: Resize to a phone viewport on the same results screen.
steps.expected: Results should remain readable and scannable on mobile.
steps.observed: The same summary and sorted solver list remained visible in the narrow mobile layout.

evidence.network: No backend/API calls involved; localhost document + static assets only.

assertions.title: Post-round validation and score feedback are transparent

steps.action: Enter two valid words (TAXIES, AERATE) and one invalid word (ZZZ), then reveal.
steps.expected: Each entered word remains visible with valid/invalid status and point values.
steps.observed: Results kept all three entries visible, marked TAXIES and AERATE valid, marked ZZZ invalid, and displayed point values.

steps.action: Toggle the TAXIES uniqueness checkbox off.
steps.expected: The total score should recalculate immediately.
steps.observed: The score changed immediately from 6 to 3 when TAXIES was unchecked.

evidence.network: No backend/API calls involved; localhost document + static assets only.

assertions.title: Desktop inspection can reveal a found word's board path

steps.action: Hover the valid result word TAXIES on desktop.
steps.observed: Hovering TAXIES highlighted 6 board cells matching the word path.

steps.action: Move the pointer off the result word.
steps.observed: After hover exit, highlighted cell count returned to 0.

evidence.network: No backend/API calls involved; localhost document + static assets only.

steps.action: Reach a revealed results state with entered words, score, and solver output visible.
steps.expected: Restart should clear all round-local state.
steps.observed: The revealed state contained entered words, score, solver output, and result inspection controls.

steps.action: Use Restart round and inspect the fresh board on desktop and mobile.
steps.expected: A fresh round should show a new board/timer with cleared words, results, score summary, highlights, and collapsed mobile drawer.
steps.observed: Restart produced a new board at 01:00, cleared entered words and results, removed score summary/highlights, and showed the mobile button as Show entered words (collapsed).

evidence.network: No backend/API calls involved; localhost document + static assets only.

assertions.title: Dictionary readiness gates reveal and fails visibly

steps.action: Open solo setup with English selected and observe dictionary status before and after the trie loads.
steps.expected: The UI should show loading then ready, with reveal unavailable while the trie is not ready.
steps.observed: Setup showed Loading dictionary… before switching to Dictionary ready; pre-start reveal remained unavailable while loading.

steps.action: Abort en_dict_trie.js in the isolated browser session, reopen the app, start a round, and reveal.
steps.expected: The UI should show a clear dictionary failure instead of silently failing.
steps.observed: The app showed Dictionary failed to load, allowed restart/reveal controls to remain visible, and surfaced a Dictionary error card after reveal.

evidence.network: Blocked local asset request **/en_dict_trie.js inside the isolated browser session to verify the visible failure path; no backend/API calls involved.

assertions.title: Solver output stays hidden until reveal or timeout

steps.action: Start a fresh solo round and inspect the live state before reveal.
steps.expected: Solver output and results should remain hidden during active play.
steps.observed: The live round showed only the board, composer, and entered-word panel; no Solo results or solver list appeared before reveal.

steps.expected: Solver output should appear only after round completion.
steps.observed: Solver output became visible only on the revealed/time-up results surfaces.

evidence.network: No backend/API calls involved; localhost document + static assets only.

frictions.description: A long agent-browser wait command hit a temporary daemon busy error while the timeout round was already progressing.
frictions.resolution: Re-read the page state after the minute elapsed and captured the finished timeout results without restarting the validator session.

summary: Tested 7 assigned core-solo results/restart assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
